lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਗਸੈ ਕਮਲੁ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੈ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖਾਇਆ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: bigasai kamal kiran paragaasai paragatt kar dekhaaeaa |15|
lines.english: Your heart-lotus shall blossom forth, and the ray of God's Divine Light shall illuminate your heart; He shall be revealed to You. ||15||
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, realize that He is very near.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਹੀ ਨੇੜੈ ਦੂਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sad hee nerrai door na jaanahu |
lines.english: He is always near at hand; He is never far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਾਰਿ ਜੀਵਾਲੇ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape maar jeevaale avar na koee |
lines.english: He Himself kills, and gives life; there is no other at all.
The True Lord is Himself the Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੬॥੨॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee aap gavaae sukh paaeaa |16|2|24|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, glorious greatness is obtained. Eradicating self-conceit, peace is found. ||16||2||24||
Maaroo, Solahas, Fourth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
The Lord Lord Himself is the One who exalts and embellishes.
Do not consider any other work.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਵਸੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh sach vasai ghatt antar sahaje sach samaaee he |1|
lines.english: The True Lord abides deep within the heart of the Gurmukh, who intuitively merges in the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਤ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur gur karat sadaa sukh paaeaa gur charanee chit laaee he |2|
lines.english: Calling out, "Guru, Guru", I have found eternal peace; my consciousness is focused on the Guru's feet. ||2||
By Guru's Grace, they are intuitively absorbed in Him.
The True Lord dwells within the minds of all.
I serve the True Guru, and no other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੈ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੈ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hai giaan satigur hai poojaa |
lines.english: The True Guru is spiritual wisdom; the True Guru is worship and adoration.
Without the True Guru, those who are attached to duality

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤਨ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਭਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur te naam ratan dhan paaeaa satigur kee sevaa bhaaee he |3|
lines.english: From the True Guru, I have obtained the wealth, the jewel of the Naam. Service to the True Guru is pleasing to me. ||3||
come and go, and wander in reincarnation; these unfortunate ones die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak tin kee fir gat hovai ji guramukh raheh saranaaee he |4|
lines.english: O Nanak, even after they are emancipated, those who become Gurmukh remain in the Guru's Sanctuary. ||4||
The love of the Gurmukh is forever true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਰਖਿ ਲੇਵਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: hohu deaal kripaa kar har jeeo rakh levahu gur saranaaee he |5|
lines.english: O Dear Lord, please be kind, and grant Your Grace; please keep me in the Guru's Sanctuary. ||5||
I beg for the invaluable Naam, the Name of the Lord, from the Guru.
My Tenth Gate has been opened and revealed.
The True Guru trickles the Ambrosial Nectar into my mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦ ਵਜਹਿ ਧੁਨਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: teh anahad sabad vajeh dhun baanee sahaje sehaj samaaee he |6|
lines.english: The unstruck sound current of the Shabad vibrates and resounds there, with the melody of the Guru's Bani; one is easily, intuitively absorbed in the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਕਰਤੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau karatai dhur likh paaee |
lines.english: Those who are so pre-ordained by the Creator,
pass their nights and days calling on the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੋ ਸੀਝੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin satigur ko seejhai naahee gur charanee chit laaee he |7|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, no one understands; focus your consciousness on the Guru's Feet. ||7||
The Gurmukh receives the wealth of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aape kripaa kare naam devai naanak naam samaaee he |8|
lines.english: When the Lord grants His Grace, He bestows the Naam; Nanak is immersed and absorbed in the Naam. ||8||
The Lord Himself blesses those with whom He is pleased.
The wealth of the Naam is easily, intuitively received.
The jewel of spiritual wisdom is revealed within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: eeh vaddiaaee gur te paaee satigur kau sad bal jaaee he |9|
lines.english: This glorious greatness is obtained from the Guru; I am forever a sacrifice to the True Guru. ||9||
With the rising of the sun, the darkness of the night is dispelled.
Spiritual ignorance is eradicated, by the priceless jewel of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਅਤਿ ਭਾਰੀ ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: satigur giaan ratan at bhaaree karam milai sukh paaee he |10|
lines.english: The True Guru is the fantastically valuable jewel of spiritual wisdom; blessed by God's Mercy, peace is found. ||10||
In all four ages he is considered to be pure and good.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naame naam rate sukh paaeaa naam rahiaa liv laaee he |11|
lines.english: Imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he finds peace. He remains lovingly focused on the Naam. ||11||
The Gurmukh obtains the Naam, and his good reputation increases.
In intuitive peace he wakes, and in intuitive peace he sleeps.
The Gurmukh receives the Naam.
